title: My Solo Trip to South Africa

questions.question: What does 'splattered with Antelope blood' mean in this context?
options: A) The antelope was bleeding heavily
B) The speaker got blood from an antelope all over their jacket
C) The antelope was painted with blood
D) The speaker hunted an antelope successfully
questions.explanation: 在这个视频片段中，speaker描述自己被羚羊血溅得满身都是（splattered with Antelope blood），all over my jacket说明血溅到了夹克上。这是他们在safari打猎或观看猎捕后的结果。

questions.question: What weather condition does the speaker mention about Cape Town in the morning?
questions.explanation: 视频中提到 Cape Town 早上的天气是 foggy low，即有低沉的雾气。这是旧金山的典型天气特征，speaker说这个场景让他想起旧金山。

questions.question: Why did the speaker decide to hire a private tour in Cape Town?
options: A) Because they wanted to save money
B) Because they were nervous about exploring alone
C) Because they had already seen everything
D) Because the public transport was free
questions.explanation: 根据字幕，speaker提到自己 nervous，所以雇佣了私人导游带他们去 Simons Town。这是出于安全考虑和对陌生环境的谨慎。

questions.question: Where did the private guide take the speaker?
questions.explanation: 视频明确提到 speaker hired a private guide for half a day to take me down to Simon's Town。Simon's Town 是开普敦附近的一个海滨小镇，以企鹅滩闻名。

questions.question: What animal might you see along the drive mentioned in the video?
questions.explanation: 视频中明确提到 to do this drive and you'll probably see some ostriches along the way。鸵鸟是南非公路上常见的动物。

questions.question: What is Beau Cop known for according to the video?
questions.explanation: 视频提到 stopped in Beau cop a neighborhood known for its colorful homes。Beau Cop（正确应为Bo-Kaap）是开普敦著名的彩色房屋区。

questions.question: What is one explanation mentioned for why the homes in Beau Cop are painted bright colors?
options: B) Homeowners painted them as an expression of freedom
D) The paint was on sale
questions.explanation: 视频中提到 one is that homeowners painted them bright as an expression of Freedom。这是关于彩色房屋来源的一种解释。

questions.question: What is described as 'an absolute must' in Cape Town?
options: B) Taking the Table Mountain Aerial Tramway
questions.explanation: 视频明确提到 else in Cape Town that's an absolute must is a trip up the table Mountain aerial Tramway。桌山缆车是开普敦必游项目。

questions.question: What iconic feature of Cape Town can you hike according to the video?
questions.explanation: 视频提到 do here is hike lion's head this is an iconic feature of Cape Town。狮头峰是开普敦著名的徒步地点。

questions.question: Where did the speaker finally arrive after their journey?
questions.explanation: 视频提到 I've made it to Sabi Sands。Sabi Sands 是南非著名的私人野生动物保护区，与克鲁格国家公园相邻。

questions.question: What is the difference between a private reserve and Kruger National Park?
options: A) Private reserves have fewer animals
B) Private reserves don't have some of the rules that Kruger does
D) Private reserves are only for tourists
questions.explanation: 视频提到 it is a private reserve it doesn't have some of the rules that Krueger does。私人保护区相比克鲁格国家公园有更少的限制。

questions.question: Why must you stick to designated roads in a national park?
options: B) To limit what you can see
C) To protect the environment and animals
D) Because there are no other roads
questions.explanation: 视频提到 you also have to stick to designated roads in a national park which means you're limited to what... 这意味着在国家公园内必须遵守规定道路，以保护环境和动物。

questions.question: How can you enter a private reserve according to the video?
options: A) By yourself in any vehicle
B) By staying at a lodge and driving with their guides
questions.explanation: 视频提到 is to stay at a lodge there and drive with their guides。必须住在保护区内的 lodge 并由导游带领进入。

questions.question: What does Sabi Sans offer every day according to the video?
options: B) Morning and afternoon drives with a guide
questions.explanation: 视频提到 days in the mornings and afternoons and I'm excited to see what we find Sabi Sans has a... 以及后面的 morning and afternoon drive with a guide every day。

questions.question: Describe what the speaker tracked in the morning and what they found.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，需要根据视频内容描述早上追踪动物的情况。
questions.referenceAnswer: The speaker tracked a mother leopard and her older male cub through the bush. They found an older male leopard cub with a dead antelope up in a tree.
questions.hint: Think about what animal was tracked and what was found in the tree.

questions.question: What do African farmers use bees for according to the video?
options: B) To keep elephants away from their crops
questions.explanation: 视频明确提到 African farmers will raise these to keep elephants away from their crops。养蜂是为了防止大象破坏农作物。

questions.question: What happened at breakfast one morning at the river?
options: B) A herd of animals showed up
questions.explanation: 视频提到 one morning at breakfast after a sunrise game drive a herd showed up at the river outside。一群动物在河边出现。

questions.question: What was described as 'the most exciting' of the entire trip?
options: B) Finding lions in the afternoon
questions.explanation: 视频明确提到 the most exciting of the entire trip we went out in the afternoon looking for lions and found... 下午寻找狮子被认为是最令人兴奋的经历。

questions.question: What realization did the speaker have while sitting in the vehicle with all lights off?
options: B) They were sitting surrounded by hungry lions
D) They should have brought a flashlight
questions.explanation: 视频提到 all of the vehicle lights off and that's when I had the realization that I was sitting in... 后面提到 surrounded by hungry Lions。

questions.question: What was it like sitting in a completely open vehicle in complete darkness?
questions.explanation: 视频描述 it was thrilling it was still totally... 在完全黑暗中坐在完全开放的车辆里，周围是饥饿的狮子，speaker形容这是 thrilling（令人兴奋/刺激的）。

questions.question: What was the biggest question people asked the speaker about traveling alone in South Africa?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，需要根据视频内容回答关于独自旅行的问题。
questions.referenceAnswer: The biggest question was how the speaker felt about traveling alone in South Africa, asked by family, friends, and even locals.
questions.hint: Think about the speaker's feelings about solo travel.

questions.question: What advice would the speaker give to someone who feels hesitant about traveling alone in South Africa?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，需要根据视频内容给出旅行建议。
questions.referenceAnswer: The speaker would recommend coming on a tour, especially for those who feel hesitant or don't have a lot of travel experience. They also mentioned places where you would have to be more cautious.
questions.hint: Consider what the speaker said about tours and cautious places.

questions.question: How does the speaker describe their solo trip to South Africa?
questions.explanation: 视频提到 I had a great time this was definitely a successful solo trip for me。speaker明确表示这是一次成功的独自旅行。

questions.question: What animals were described as having 'the Zoomies' and chasing each other?
options: C) A group of animals (likely antelopes or similar)
questions.explanation: 视频提到 morning there was a group of them that had the Zoomies they were chasing each other around。Zoomies 是指动物精力充沛时四处奔跑玩耍的行为。

questions.question: How much food can an elephant eat up to according to the video?
questions.explanation: 视频明确提到 can eat up to 600 pounds of food a day。大象每天可以吃多达600磅的食物。
